title: Only Flax
description: Adds flax crops to Minecraft. Only do that and nothing else.
body:
Note: You probably don't need this if you already have [Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries).

## Overview

A simple Minecraft mod that adds flax crops to Minecraft. Only do that and nothing else.

Get seeds from naturally generated wild flax, and plant them like any other crop. You can craft string from flax you harvested.

## Integration

This mod can work with:

- Botany Pots
- Create
- Ender IO
- Farmer's Delight
- Immersive Engineering
- Mekanism
- Serene Seasons
- Thermal Series
